Researchers rarely use this file alone.
This file is based on information from the CMS claim form 1500.

What does this file include? (variable highlights)
Diagnosis (ICD diagnosis)
Procedure (CPT code)
Dates of service
Charges
Allowed amounts
Reimbursement amount
Provider NPI number
